description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MiNiFi-CPP Verify Package that runs on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing MiNiFi-CPP packages on different platforms, including Rocky Linux and Ubuntu, for both x86-64 and aarch64 architectures. Each job should restore and save ccache, install dependencies, build the package, and upload artifacts. The workflow should also run tests and report results.
